title: Homeify
description: Another home plugin, but this one has a gui built in.
body:
Homeify is for those who want to easily get back to there home in a vanilla friendly way. Homeify allows you to save a location in a gui and allows you to teleport there from anywhere in any dimention! Homeify saves per player homes on a yml so you dont have to worry about anything! There is a limit of 8 homes per person.

### REQUIERMENTS
[Simple Gui Api](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-gui-api) and a spigot server :)


Enjoy!
